name: Connect
info:
Logs in to the GoFa RWS API and stores the session cookie in global.rws_cookie.
Run this once before Read State / Move / Save Pose.

Env: ROBOT_IP (default 192.168.20.21)
Out: msg.payload = { ok:true } on success.

name: Read State
info:
Fetches and parses the standard RWS endpoints (ctrl-state, opmode, speed, RAPID exec, TCP position, joints) and accumulates them into global.robot_data.

Needs Connect to have run first (uses global.rws_cookie).
Env: ROBOT_IP (default 192.168.20.21)
Out: msg.payload = global.robot_data

name: Move
info:
Sends a motion command to the RAPID socket server on the robot (TCP :PORT).

Input msg.payload (one of):
  { routine: 'home'|'p1'|'p2'|'p3' }   named point
  { jog: 'X+'|'Y-'|'Z+'|'RX+'|..., step: <number> }
  { goto: '<saved-point-id>' }          uses global.points

Pre-flight requires global.robot_data.ctrlstate === 'motoron' (run Read State first).
Env: ROBOT_IP (default 192.168.20.21), PORT (default 1025)
Out: msg.payload = { ok, routine, ack } (or { ok:false, error } on bad/blocked input)

name: Save Pose
info:
Reads the current TCP pose over RWS and appends it to global.points, persisting to points.json.

Needs Connect to have run first (uses global.rws_cookie).
Input: optional msg.payload.name (auto-named 'Point N' if blank).
Env: ROBOT_IP (default 192.168.20.21)
Out: msg.payload = { ok, name, points }

name: Connect (1)
info:
Log in to the GoFa RWS API and cache the session cookie in global.rws_cookie.
Run once before Read State / Move / Motors / Save Pose / Delete Point.

Env: ROBOT_IP
Out: msg.payload = { ok:true }

name: Read State (1)
info:
Fetch + parse the standard RWS endpoints into global.robot_data and output it.
Needs Connect first (uses global.rws_cookie).

Env: ROBOT_IP
Out: msg.payload = { ctrlstate, opmode, speed, rapid, x,y,z, j1..j6, updated }

name: Move (1)
info:
Send a command to the RAPID socket server (TCP :PORT). One node for all motion + the speed/set-home commands.

Input msg.payload (one of):
  { routine:'home'|'p1'|'p2'|'p3' }      named point
  { jog:'X+'|'Y-'|'Z+'|'RX+'|..., step } Cartesian/tool jog (mm / deg)
  { joint:'J1+'|'J6-'|..., step }        per-axis jog (deg)
  { goto:'<saved-point-id>' }            go to a saved point (global.points)
  { speed:1..100 }                       speed override (%)
  { sethome:true }                       set HOME to current pose (persisted)

Moves require global.robot_data.ctrlstate === 'motoron' (run Read State first).
Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }  (or { ok:false, error } on bad/blocked input)

name: Motors
Save Pose (1)
Delete Point
Run Sequence
Stop Sequence
info:
Stop a running sequence (clears global.seq_running).

Out: { ok:true }

name: Connect (2)
info:
Log in to the GoFa RWS API and cache the session cookie in global.rws_cookie.
Run once before Read State / Move / Motors / Save Pose / Delete Point.

Env: ROBOT_IP, RWS_USER, RWS_PASS
Out: msg.payload = { ok:true }

name: Read State (2)
info:
Fetch + parse the standard RWS endpoints into global.robot_data and output it.
Needs Connect first (uses global.rws_cookie).

Env: ROBOT_IP
Out: msg.payload = { ctrlstate, opmode, speed, rapid, x,y,z, j1..j6, updated }

Moves require global.robot_data.ctrlstate === 'motoron' (run Read State first).

name: Connect (4)
info:
Log in to the GoFa RWS API and cache the session cookie in global.rws_cookie.
Run once before other nodes.

Env: ROBOT_IP, RWS_USER, RWS_PASS
Out: { ok:true }

name: Read State (4)
info:
Fetch + parse RWS endpoints into global.robot_data and output it.
Needs Connect first.

Env: ROBOT_IP
Out: { ctrlstate, opmode, speed, rapid, x,y,z, j1..j6, updated }

name: Go Named Point
info:
Move to a named home/pick/place position. All params in node properties.

Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT, ROUTINE
Input: any (trigger only)
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }

name: Jog
info:
Jog the tool along a Cartesian or rotational axis by a fixed step.

Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT, AXIS, STEP
Input: any (trigger only)
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }

name: Jog Joint
info:
Jog a single joint axis by a fixed step.

Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT, JOINT, STEP
Input: any (trigger only)
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }

name: Set Speed
info:
Set the speed override (1–100 %). No motor guard — can be sent any time.

Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT, SPEED
Input: any (trigger only)
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }

name: Set Home
info:
Set the HOME position to the robot's current pose and persist it on the controller.
No motor guard — can be sent while stopped.

Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT
Input: any (trigger only)
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }

name: Go To Point
info:
Move to a saved point by its ID (from global.points / points.json).

Env: ROBOT_IP, PORT, POINT_ID
Input: any (trigger only)
Out: { ok, cmd, ack }

name: Motors (3)
Save Pose (4)
Delete Point (3)
Run Sequence (3)
Stop Sequence (3)
info:
Stop a running sequence (clears global.seq_running).

Out: { ok:true }

return msg;

name: Merge poll data
Serve HTML page
Serve JSON data
Route move command
Format move response
func:
msg.statusCode = 200;
return msg;

name: Save prep
func:
msg.payload = { name: (msg.payload && msg.payload.name) || '' };
return msg;

name: Save response
Delete prep
func:
msg.payload = { id: msg.payload.id, name: msg.payload.id };
return msg;

name: Motor prep
func:
msg.payload = { action: msg.payload.state };
return msg;

name: Sequence prep
Input: any msg  |  Output: ctrlstate / opmode / speed / rapid / x,y,z / j1-j6
{ j1, j2, j3, j4, j5, j6 } degrees
HOME: robot moves to saved home position  |  SETHOME: saves current pose as the new home
Controls motor power via RWS  |  Override: msg.payload.action = 'motoron' | 'motoroff'
Moves TCP relative to current pose  |  X/Y/Z = base frame mm (max 50)  |  RX/RY/RZ = tool frame deg (max 30)
Rotates one joint by a relative angle (max 30 deg)  |  Override: msg.payload.{joint,dir,step}
Run in order: 1-Save  2-List  3-Go To  4-Delete  |  Point name in node properties or msg.payload.name / msg.payload.id
Run Sequence: visits each saved point in order  |  Output 1 = after each step  |  Output 2 = done/stopped  |  Stop: halts after current step
PING: connectivity test  |  MOVEJ: absolute joint target  |  GRIPON/OFF: gripper  |  ZONE: blend radius  |  STOP: halt motion
SPEED-SET: speed override % via RWS mastership  |  RAPID-VAR-READ: read PERS/VAR  |  RAPID-EXEC / RAPID-VAR-WRITE: require PC Interface option
SYSTEM-INFO: RW version + ctrl identity  |  ELOG: controller event log  |  FILE-READ: download file  |  UPLOAD-MOD: deploy RAPID .mod
IO-LIST: enumerate signals  |  DI-READ: digital in  |  AI-READ: analog in  |  DO/AO-WRITE: require external I/O module (not on CRB-15000 default)
Enable/disable robot lead-through (hand-guiding) via RWS  |  Requires manual mode + enable switch held on FlexPendant
EXPORT: dump saved-points list to msg.payload  |  IMPORT: replace list from msg.payload array (connect Export output to Import input for backup/restore)
STATE/IO: WebSocket push from controller  |  VAR/POSE: polling (toggle on/off with any input)  |  Messages stream to debug until toggled off or redeployed
{ ok, x, y, z, q1, q2, q3, q4 }
